title: Procure 500x LilyGO T-Echo units
description: Contact LilyGO business/sales for 500-unit quote on T-Echo (nRF52840 + SX1262 + GPS + e-ink). Confirm includes 1200mAh battery, protective case, antennas. Negotiate price to target $45-48/unit. Get lead time, MOQ, payment terms. Document quote received, negotiate if possible, then decide on order or escalate to parent epic. Acceptance criteria: written quote + specs confirmation + lead time documented in beads.
